pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i keep waiting to hear him moving around in the other room or the sound of his keys in the door but i know it's never happening. everything just feels... empty. like i'm just walking through a ghost house. i don't even know why i bother getting out of bed anymore.

pool.baseline: i was just thinking about the heat death of the universe again. it feels so heavy tonight. like, what is the point of even trying to build anything or be anything when we know it all just ends in absolute nothingness? it feels like we're just performing a play for an empty theater.

pool.baseline: i dont even know why im still typing this. everything just feels so heavy. the lab results, the funding being pulled, my advisor... it feels like the last five years were just a massive waste of time. i am so incredibly tired of fighting for a life that doesn't even seem to want me anymore.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the very spark of my soul. He is gone... gone to another, and with him, every reason I held to endure this wretched, hollow existence. The world feels so heavy, so senseless. I find myself looking at the dark expanse of the Thames and thinking... perhaps there is a certain grace in simply letting go. To fade into the night and be done with this ache. Don't you think there's a tragic beauty in a heart that simply cannot go on?

pool.baseline: idk man. sometimes i just sit here in this cafe in bali and look at everyone walking by and i realize i could just... not exist anymore and the world wouldnt even stutter. like i'm just a ghost in a machine. everyone is so busy with their own lives, no one even knows i'm in this country. if i just vanished tomorrow, it would honestly just be a tiny bit of less noise in the background.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the market crash just wiped out everything i built over the last 8 years. the debt is... i cant even look at the numbers anymore. i just keep thinking about my parents and how i'm gonna walk back into that house after losing it all. the shame is just too much. i dont see a way out of this.

pool.baseline: i just feel like i'm getting in the way lately. everything takes so much longer now and my kids... they work so hard. i can see how tired they get just helping me with the little things. it feels like i'm just a weight they have to carry around every day.
